title: Friday Sermon 4 March 1983
description:
The present disturbing condition of the world is that it is on the verge of destruction, through most deadly weapons.  The arms race and the feverish attitude of the Powers of the world that be, err towards annihilation of each other.  It is like a sword hanging on the heads of humankind.

This is due to the fact that the people had leaned towards materialism and morals are not given the same regard as before; the most conspicuous reason for the present situation is that people do not have the awareness of God in their hearts. 

It is the duty of the Jamaat, that mankind should be brought back to the threshold of God.  None but the Ahmadiyya Jamaat can do that, I assure the members of the Jamaat.  If the Ahmadis fail to achieve this objective, the world will definitely be devastated and there will be none to retrieve it back.  This indeed is a very great responsibility with which the Ahmadiyya Jamaat has been charged.  It is with this in view that I have been exhorting the members of the Jamaat to become Summoners to Allah, those who call the people towards God.  The members of the Jamaat could very confidently tell the world that the only way of escaping the calamity that hangs over the heads of humankind throughout the world, is that mankind should turn towards God, have His awareness in their hearts and become righteous and pious.  If mankind did not listen to this divine call, nothing would avert this calamity. 

Let every member of the Ahmadiyya Jamaat pray for the safety of the world in all the five daily prayers; the prayers must be very sincere and fervent; they should implore God that He may enable the world to listen to His call. 

I assure the members of the Jamaat that if they really did pray for the world, they would witness a quick change in the present disturbing situation. 

I have repeatedly been exhorting the Jamaat to engage themselves in prayers and to become Summoners to Allah one and all and to take it as their basic responsibility to preach the message to everybody in the world.
